upasargachandrika.example_text: 'aTa ha sma tataH puro vipfcCamAnAScaranti' (jE0 brA0 255) viSabdo nAnAtve yaTA vipraSna ityatra
'upo emi cikituzo vipracCam' (f0 7863) vipracCaM viprazwum nAnA praSnAnkartum
'ApfcCe tyAM gamizyAmi punarezyAmi cApyaham' (BA0 saBA0 31) ApfcCe Amantraye gamanAnujYAM yAce
'ApfcCe sADayizyAmi gacCa vipra yaTAsuKam' (BA0 ASva0 1952) ukto'rTaH
'ApfcCasva priyasaKamamuM tuNgamAliNgya SElam' (meGa 12)
'ApfcCati ca yacCreyaH karoti ca hitaM vacaH' (BA0 sO0 222) ihANArTe na kaScid viSezaH kriyate asTAna AN iti vA suvacam
'anApfcCanhi gfhRAno hastacCedanamarhati' (gO0 Da0 ) anujYAmayAcamAna ityarTaH
'Apfzwo'sIha kOnteya svasti prApnuhi BArata' (BA0 saBA0 7822) Apfzwo dattagamanAnujYaH

'gArgiM mAti prAkzI: mA te mUrGA vyaptat' (Sa0 brA0 14661) uttarottaraM praSnAn mA kArzIH ati praSnyA vE devatA ati pfcCasi atikramya maryAdAM praSno'tipraSnaH dattottaropi punaH praSno yaH kevalAya KedAya Bavati so'tipraSnaH atIndriyArTapraSno vAtipraSnaH
'nakzatramatipfcCantaM bAlamarTotivartate' (kO0 a0 91424) atipfcCantamatiSayena pfcCantam
'upaSikzAyA aBipraSninam' (tE0 brA0 346) praSnasyopari punaH praSno'BipraSna iti sAyaRaH
'suBAzitapraSnapratipraSnEH kAlo'tivartate' (tantrA0 34) pratipraSnaH praSne sati praSnaH
'vyAsamekAgramAsInaM paryapfcCanmunISvarAH' (bf0 parA0 saM0 12) paryapfcCan paryAyeRApfcCan
'yadA hi bahavo vfdDA guRavanto bahuSrutAH pariprakzyanti kAkutsTaM vakzyAmi kimahaM tadA' (rA0 21266).. ukto'rTaH
'kuSalaM paripfcCantaM kaTaM Sakzye nirIkzitum' (rA0 36214) paripfcCantaM paryAyeRa pfcCantam (janakam ) rAmasyoktirezA sItApahAre sati
'mArkaRqeyena kaTitaM BIzmAya paripfcCate' (hari0 1166)
'tadvidDi praRipAtena paripraSnena sevayA' (gItA 434)
'upapfcCAmahe gatvA viduraM ca mahAmatim' (BA0 sO0 233) upetya prakzyAma ityarTaH
'so'haM piturniyogAttvAmupaprazwumihAgataH' (BA0 SAM0 32612) ukto'rTaH
'upasamprazwumarhAmi tamahaM kena hetunA' (BA0 SAM0 3719) upasamprazwum upagatya samyak prazwum
